subject: fix(mobile-web): map overflow, bottom sheet visibility, PWA banner above header
body:
Three structural fixes for mobile web:

1. Map overflowing viewport: FuelMapWeb div used flex:1 which doesn't
   constrain height on a plain <div> without explicit parent height.
   Changed to position:absolute with inset:0 so the map fills exactly
   its container. Added position:relative to FuelMap container and
   overflow:hidden to the home screen container.

2. Bottom sheet invisible: Added explicit top:0 to the sheet's absolute
   positioning (was relying on RN Web default). Combined with the
   container overflow:hidden, ensures the sheet stays within bounds.

3. PWA actions above header: Created PWABanner component that combines
   install prompt, update notification, and offline-ready status into
   a single dismissable banner above the header. Prioritizes: update >
   install > offline-ready. Replaces the separate UpdatePrompt and
   removes InstallPrompt from the bottom sheet.

Tags: mobile-web, map, bottom-sheet, pwa, layout
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-web-ux
Semver: patch
